_source: AI impact assessment tool v1.0 — Table 1 (Risk likelihood scale). Transcribed verbatim from instrument/guidance/AI_impact_assessment_tool.md (§3, Table 1).
_note: tiers_ordered is ascending (least to most likely). The rating engine (TECH_SPEC §10) validates likelihood labels against this list; the descriptors are supplied to generalists/reconciler per TECH_SPEC §9.3.

tiers.label: Rare
tiers.descriptor: Will only eventuate in exceptional circumstances or as a result of a combination of unusual events

tiers.label: Unlikely
tiers.descriptor: May eventuate at some time but is not likely to occur in the foreseeable future

tiers.label: Possible
tiers.descriptor: May eventuate within the foreseeable future

tiers.label: Likely
tiers.descriptor: Will probably eventuate within the foreseeable future

tiers.label: Almost certain
tiers.descriptor: Almost certain to eventuate within the foreseeable future
